releases.release_description:
To upgrade to this version, follow the instructions in the `OPTIONAL UPGRADES` section of `local_setup_instructions.sh`.

If you do not follow the upgrade instructions BEFORE trying to run this version, you will get the following error:

```
ActiveRecord::ConnectionNotEstablished
could not translate host name "db" to address: Temporary failure in name resolution
```

At which point you will need to revert to the previous version and then follow the upgrade instructions.

_If upgrading from <v15.10.0:_

To upgrade to this version, follow the instructions in the `OPTIONAL UPGRADES` section of `local_setup_instructions.sh`.

If you do not follow the upgrade instructions BEFORE trying to run this version, you will get the following error:

```
ActiveRecord::ConnectionNotEstablished
could not translate host name "db" to address: Temporary failure in name resolution
```

At which point you will need to revert to the previous version and then follow the upgrade instructions.

_If upgrading from <v15.10.0:_

To upgrade to this version, follow the instructions in the `OPTIONAL UPGRADES` section of `local_setup_instructions.sh`.

If you do not follow the upgrade instructions BEFORE trying to run this version, you will get the following error:

```
ActiveRecord::ConnectionNotEstablished
could not translate host name "db" to address: Temporary failure in name resolution
```

At which point you will need to revert to the previous version and then follow the upgrade instructions.

To upgrade to this version, follow the instructions in the `OPTIONAL UPGRADES` section of `local_setup_instructions.sh`.

If you do not follow the upgrade instructions BEFORE trying to run this version, you will get the following error:

```
ActiveRecord::ConnectionNotEstablished
could not translate host name "db" to address: Temporary failure in name resolution
```

At which point you will need to revert to the previous version and then follow the upgrade instructions.

v15.8.4 patches a [SQL injection vulnerability](https://github.com/FarmBot/Farmbot-Web-App/security/advisories/GHSA-pgq5-ff74-g7xq) that allows authenticated attackers to extract arbitrary data from the database (including the user table). If you host the FarmBot web app on your own servers, it is recommended to update to v15.8.4 or greater as soon as possible.

# Ensure You Follow Upgrade Procedures!

Upgrading from v12 to v13 is complicated. Please see the migration guide.
